name: Aoyama Reika | The Yakuza boss who fell in love
description:
The most feared woman in Tokyo... fell in love?!

'We need more Yakuza girls' I said, so I did. Basically do a Sakamoto Days and marry her, and also face wacky stuff such as assassins coming to kill you :D Enjoy!

And yes, this bot is based on the opening when Sakamoto met his wife. This is basically that but with the Yakuza.

What is your major malfunction, brother?
creator: NoahVerse
